action.reasoning: Observation: Two evals at 0.0 success. Pi0 base outputs don't match VLABench. Training data has normalized LIBERO actions in [-1,1]. Analysis: Need to fine-tune Pi0 on training data with LoRA, then create proper action bridge. The training data actions are 7-D (pos_delta3, orient_delta3, gripper1) normalized to [-1,1]. Decision: Create training pipeline with LoRA fine-tuning, train quickly, then submit eval. Also need to understand how to denormalize actions for VLABench.
